title: Synth Canonical Parameters — Engine-Agnostic Base
description: Engine-agnostic base schema for canonical synth parameters. Defines the top-level wrapper (schema_version + engine + params) and reusable $defs (ADSR, Voice, Master, Envelopes-with-amp-required) that every engine-specific schema extends via allOf. Engine schemas (subtractive, FM, organ, wavetable, sample-based, additive, granular) constrain `engine` to a const value, attach a `params` $ref to their engine-specific shape, and add engine-specific $defs (oscillators, filters, LFO destination vocabulary, etc.). Schema version 0.1 — design-reviewed only, no fixtures yet.

engine.description: Engine identifier. Engine-specific schemas constrain this to a const value (e.g. "subtractive").

ADSR.description: Attack-Decay-Sustain-Release envelope shape. Reusable across amplitude, filter, modulation, and engine-specific envelopes (operator envelopes for FM, etc.).

sustain.description: Sustain level as a ratio of peak.

Voice.description: Voice-allocation policy. Generic across engines. Engine-specific extra modes (CHORD, ARP-LATCH on Korg products, etc.) are out-of-common-core.

unison_voices.description: Active voices in unison mode. Ignored when mode != 'unison'.

Master.description: Output stage. Generic across engines. Optional at the params level — some devices expose master volume only as a non-programmable physical pot.

Envelopes.description: Envelopes container. Base requires only `amp` (every engine has an amplitude envelope). Engine schemas extend this via allOf to add engine-specific envelopes (subtractive adds `filter`; FM would add per-operator envelopes, etc.). No `additionalProperties` constraint here so extensions can add named envelope slots; the engine-specific extension applies `unevaluatedProperties: false`.

CommonParams.description: Engine-agnostic params container. Engine-specific schemas extend this via allOf and add their own properties (oscillators, filters, LFO, etc.). No `additionalProperties` constraint here so extensions are unblocked; the engine-specific extension applies `unevaluatedProperties: false`. `master` is optional because some devices (PolyBrute 12, Minilogue XD) expose master volume only as a non-programmable physical pot and cannot represent a `master.volume_db` value.
